channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Don't like Windows 11's Copilot key? Microsoft confirms it will let you remap it later this year - Windows Central
item.description:
1. Don't like Windows 11's Copilot key? Microsoft confirms it will let you remap it later this year  Windows Central

  4. Microsoft frees the Copilot key from AI  Notebookcheck
  5. Here is how to remap the Copilot key in Windows 11, without Microsoft's upcoming "fix"  Neowin

item.title: Virtuos eager to port Grand Theft Auto 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 to the Nintendo Switch 2 - My Nintendo News
item.description:
1. Virtuos eager to port Grand Theft Auto 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 to the Nintendo Switch 2  My Nintendo News
  2. Port specialist Virtuos says it wants to bring GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 to Switch  Video Games Chronicle
  3. As L.A. Noire turns 15, Virtuos says it wants to bring GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 to Nintendo Switch  Pocket Tactics
  4. Virtuos wants to take on the task of bringing Red Dead Redemption 2 and GTA V to the Nintendo Switch 2  Gamereactor UK
  5. Virtuos would like the chance to bring GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 to Switch  GoNintendo

item.title: First Public macOS Kernel Exploit on Apple M5 Prepared Using Mythos Preview in Five Days - CyberSecurityNews
item.description:
1. First Public macOS Kernel Exploit on Apple M5 Prepared Using Mythos Preview in Five Days  CyberSecurityNews
  2. Anthropic's Claude Mythos Reportedly Circumvents Apple Mac Security Systems  LinkedIn
  3. Apple’s Security Has Been Tough to Crack. Mythos Helped Find a Way In.  WSJ
  4. First Apple M5 memory exploit discovered using Anthropic AI, gives root access on MacOS — Claude Mythos helps security researchers bypass Memory Integrity Enforcement  Tom's Hardware
  5. Security Researchers, Aided By Anthropic's Mythos, Claim To Have Breached macOS  Engadget
